DARV.talk.AICARDMOD-PROPHET_CHARACTER.0-: This place... the divine aura flows here too, doesn't it?
Of course! Faith makes any gem shine brighter! Pick one!
DARV.talk.AICARDMOD-PROPHET_CHARACTER.1-: Back again! Did the oracle guide you here? I can help too!
DARV.talk.AICARDMOD-PROPHET_CHARACTER.2-: I have countless gems, but none hold your oracle's answers...

The oracle's answers aren't in gems. They live within a faithful heart.
[i][font_size=22]The girl touches the stone tablet at her chest, her gaze serene.[/font_size][/i]
Ah... well then! Take this, and let it guide you on your search!
NEOW.talk.AICARDMOD-PROPHET_CHARACTER.0-: Oracle... you have awakened me. Is this the path you've chosen?
[sine]...Go... the Spire awaits... carry your faith with you.....[/sine]
NEOW.talk.AICARDMOD-PROPHET_CHARACTER.1-: [sine]...I feel... your piety... it is warm and steady.....[/sine]
NEOW.talk.AICARDMOD-PROPHET_CHARACTER.2-: Grant me the strength to keep moving forward. My faith will not waver.
[sine]...Go then... I will be... where you look back... waiting.....[/sine]
NONUPEIPE.talk.AICARDMOD-PROPHET_CHARACT: What a magnificent place... does the oracle's hall shine as brilliantly?
Oh my, even a divine messenger should look splendidly dressed!
Faith is important, but looking radiant is also a gift to the divine — let me adorn you!
Pure white is holy, yes, but a little gold trim never hurt anyone!
...The oracle sees the heart, not the appearance. But thank you for your kindness.
Such a faithful child... very well, take this — consider it decoration from the divine!
Are you praying to something too? I pray to the oracle...
PRAY!! PRAY!! I PRAY TOO!! Take this and let's pray TOGETHER!!
WHERE IS YOUR ORACLE!! I'LL FIND HER!! CALL HER OUT!!
DID YOUR ORACLE GIVE YOU POWER YET!! NOT YET!! I'LL GIVE IT TO YOU!!
...The oracle's power comes through devotion. It isn't handed over directly.
OH!! OH!! THEN I'LL HELP YOU ACCUMULATE IT!! TAKE THIS!!
PAEL.talk.AICARDMOD-PROPHET_CHARACTER.0-: Your slumber... it feels like the calm before the oracle descends.
[thinky_dots]Child of faith... take a piece of my stillness with you......[/thinky_dots]
PAEL.talk.AICARDMOD-PROPHET_CHARACTER.1-: [thinky_dots]Your piety... gentle as candlelight... keep moving forward......[/thinky_dots]
PAEL.talk.AICARDMOD-PROPHET_CHARACTER.2-: [thinky_dots]Take my flesh... in exchange for the strength of the oracle's blessing......[/thinky_dots]
...Sacrifice is part of faith. I do not fear the cost.
[thinky_dots]Receive it... may the oracle witness your devotion......[/thinky_dots]
TANX.talk.AICARDMOD-PROPHET_CHARACTER.0-: Your strength... is it granted by the oracle? Or forged through your own training?
[b]BOTH!! Faith plus fists — THAT is true power!![/b]
TANX.talk.AICARDMOD-PROPHET_CHARACTER.1-: [b]Your oracle grants you power!! But you must swing it with your OWN hands!![/b]
TANX.talk.AICARDMOD-PROPHET_CHARACTER.2-: [b]Don't just pray!! Come practice throwing a PUNCH!![/b]

...The oracle grants me power. My hands carry it out. That is how a prophet fights.
[i][font_size=22]The girl clenches her fist, golden light flickering in her eyes.[/font_size][/i]
[b]YES!! THAT is what I wanted to hear!! Take this and GO FIGHT!![/b]
TEZCATARA.talk.AICARDMOD-PROPHET_CHARACT: The warmth of the fire... it reminds me of the oracle's embrace.
Then come inside! Let my fire [jitter][b]warm[/b][/jitter] your faith!
You're back! Good to know the oracle didn't let you get [jitter][b]lost[/b][/jitter]!
Try some of my snacks~ Even the most devoted heart needs a full [jitter][b]belly[/b][/jitter]!
...Thank you. Devotion needs strength, and strength needs warmth.
Off you go~ Carry that warmth, and make the oracle [jitter][b]proud[/b][/jitter]!
VAKUU.talk.AICARDMOD-PROPHET_CHARACTER.0: A demon... do you bow to the oracle as well? Or...
Bow? I bow to nothing. But your [sine]piety[/sine]... now that intrigues me.
VAKUU.talk.AICARDMOD-PROPHET_CHARACTER.1: Faith is the most expensive currency, you know. I could [sine]liquidate[/sine] it for you...
VAKUU.talk.AICARDMOD-PROPHET_CHARACTER.2: Give me a sliver of your [sine]devotion[/sine], and I'll give you the power you want. Deal?
...My devotion is not for sale. The oracle is my only trading partner.
Amusing... then take this. Consider it [sine]respect for your oracle[/sine].
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.AICARDMOD-PROPHET_CHA: You pray to your oracle... yet you enter my Spire. Does your oracle know you are here?
...She knows. This path was her guidance.
Interesting. Then I shall see how far your oracle can carry you.
You have returned. Has your oracle granted you sufficient power this time?
Sufficient... depends on whether my piety is sufficient.
Then keep praying. The Spire shows no mercy for your oracle's sake.
You near the summit. Tell me — does your oracle wait for you at the top?
...Whether she does or not, I will reach the end. That is a prophet's duty.
...A worthy answer. Perhaps your oracle did choose the right vessel.
